Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. M. COLLEEN RYAN, ESQ. of the Department of Industrial Relations, Tel No. 415-703-4868 appearing for the Respondent;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
